{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Four Fangs of the Serpent
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Four Fangs of the Serpent]] is a move used by the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Four Fangs of the Serpent]] is a [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
